headline: Sean T. Woodward Appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer at AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV)
summary: AeroVironment, Inc. (NASDAQ:AVAV) is among the 10 Best Military Drone Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 13, the company announced the appointment of Sean T. Woodward as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in place of Kevin McDonnell, who is stepping down from his position. He will assume charge on May 1, 2026. Woodward […]
